---
title: "Kezia Horne (or Herne?)"
---

## Kezia Horne (or Herne?)

**Dates:** (b. Avington, Hants. 1836/7)

### Description

maid at Otterbourn House

### Biography

[1851 census]

### Letters

- Letter from September 10, 1858.
- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
